products.title: 26 PCS 3D Toe Semi-Cured Gel Nail Wraps | BSJ 0032
products.body_html:
How to Use:

  1. Smooth and exfoliate: Smooth the nails with a nail file and exfoliate the dead skin around the nails.
  2. Clean: Clean the surface of the nails with an alcohol pad and keep them dry.
  3. Choose size: Choose the right size that fits your nails, peel off the protective films of the gel nail.
  4. Apply: Place the gel nail on your finger nails gently.
  5. Press edges: Use a small wood stick to press and flatten the edges of the nails.
  6. Remove excess: Remove the excess gel nail with a nail file.
  7. Cure: Cure the gel nails for 60 seconds to make them stronger, harder, and more glossy.
  8. Finish: Done! Your nails are bright and shining!
tags: Gel Nail Wraps for Toe Nails
